SELECT loan.loan_id, loan.account_id, loan.amount, pre_loan.avg_monthly
FROM loan
JOIN (
    SELECT t.account_id, AVG(monthly_total) AS avg_monthly
    FROM (
        SELECT account_id, STRFTIME('%Y-%m', date) AS month, SUM(amount) AS monthly_total
        FROM trans
        GROUP BY account_id, month
    ) AS t
    JOIN loan AS l ON t.account_id = l.account_id
    WHERE t.month < STRFTIME('%Y-%m', l.date)
      AND t.month >= STRFTIME('%Y-%m', DATE(l.date, '-12 months'))
    GROUP BY t.account_id
) AS pre_loan ON loan.account_id = pre_loan.account_id
WHERE loan.amount > pre_loan.avg_monthly * 5
